heading: Today
text: Areas of dense fog burning off by mid-morning.  Mostly sunny and seasonable.  Highs in the 70s to near 80.  Light, variable winds, becoming northwest 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear.  Areas of river valley fog developing.  Lows in the 40s to low 50s.  Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph through the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Areas of valley fog burning off to sunshine.  Warmer.  Highs in the low to mid 80s, a few upper 70s across the higher elevations north.  Winds light, varying from south to west up to 10 mph.
